title: cruciata taurica subsp. mesopotamica
intro: Cruciata taurica subsp. mesopotamica, also known as Mesopotamian goat's beard, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which can help treat various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Cruciata taurica subsp. mesopotamica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against bacterial and fungal infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
